ksa_text: Develop and maintain responsible AI assessment tools, templates, and rubrics for use across the enterprise AI development lifecycle.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to identify complex root-cause analysis and recommend mitigations

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-T-008 (AG, Task) maps to BI Developer scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5833 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.583, eu_ai_act=0.521, dcwf=0.399. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within business intelligence development and analytics engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5833 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AG-T-008 (AG, composite 0.5833) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5833 for AG domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Strong signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.583, eu_ai_act=0.521, dcwf=0.399 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.5833 exceeds external evidence threshold for AG domain inclusion in BI Developer.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5833, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
